entity.summary: Flow EVM decentralized exchange operated within the KittyPunch product suite, providing token swaps, V2 and V3 liquidity pools, concentrated-liquidity positions, farms, and related liquidity-management interfaces.
entity.notes: Current first-party KittyPunch documentation identifies PunchSwap as the suite's Flow EVM decentralized exchange and publishes V2/V3 product details and mainnet contract information. The dedicated first-party trade application exposes current swap and liquidity routes. No exact initial launch date or legal jurisdiction is asserted.

evidence.title: PunchSwap documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation identifies PunchSwap as the KittyPunch decentralized exchange on Flow EVM, describes V2 and V3 pool behavior, and publishes current mainnet contract information.

evidence.title: PunchSwap trading application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application exposes trade, swap, liquidity, and pool interfaces for PunchSwap on Flow EVM.
